# FiniteElementChains.jl

FiniteElementChains.jl is a toolbox to provide ways to integrate neural networks with finite element methods. Finite element tooling is provided by Gridap.jl. Neural network tooling is provided by Flux.jl.

## How this site is laid out

- "What are FEINNs?" gives an introduction to the motivation behind FiniteElementChains.jl
- "Tutorials" contains any tutorials developed showing the capabilities of FiniteElementChains.jl
- "API" conatains a guide to the API
- "Citations" contains citations for the documentation and package

## Getting Started

See the "First steps" tutorial.
